name: @com-junkawasaki/svgraph
description: Browser-only SVGraph editor and SVG to PresentationML/PPTX converter.

scripts.check:package: node -e "import('./docs/app.js').then((m) => { for (const name of ['buildSVGraph','buildSVGraphSidecar','svgToDrawingMl','drawingMlToSvg','svgToPptx','initSVGraphEditor','assistantPatchProposal','buildSVGraphAssistantPrompt','parseAssistantPatchProposal','validateAssistantPatch','assistantPatchDiff','applyAssistantPatch']) if (typeof m[name] !== 'function') throw new Error(name); if (!Array.isArray(m.assistantAllowedOps)) throw new Error('assistantAllowedOps'); })" && mkdir -p tmp && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs --version && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs svg2dml examples/sample.svg > tmp/package-smoke.xml && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg tmp/package-smoke.xml > tmp/package-smoke.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/group.dml > tmp/package-group.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/freeform-closed-duplicate.dml > tmp/package-freeform-closed-duplicate.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/freeform.dml > tmp/package-freeform.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/picture.dml > tmp/package-picture.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/preset.dml > tmp/package-preset.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/alpha.dml > tmp/package-alpha.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/color.dml > tmp/package-color.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/connector-style-ref.dml > tmp/package-connector-style-ref.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/fill-effects.dml > tmp/package-fill-effects.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/line-arrow.dml > tmp/package-line-arrow.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/line-flip-bool.dml > tmp/package-line-flip-bool.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/line-style.dml > tmp/package-line-style.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/style-ref.dml > tmp/package-style-ref.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/text-baseline-threshold.dml > tmp/package-text-baseline-threshold.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/text-style.dml > tmp/package-text-style.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/text-defaults.dml > tmp/package-text-defaults.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/text-bullets.dml > tmp/package-text-bullets.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/text-layout.dml > tmp/package-text-layout.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/text-shape-paint.dml > tmp/package-text-shape-paint.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/table-rich.dml > tmp/package-table-rich.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/table-merge-bool.dml > tmp/package-table-merge-bool.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/table-scaled.dml > tmp/package-table-scaled.svg && node -e "import('node:fs').then((fs) => { const group = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-group.svg', 'utf8'); if (!group.includes('transform=\"matrix(2 0 0 2 10 20)\"')) throw new Error(group); const freeformClosed = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-freeform-closed-duplicate.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['<polygon','points=\"0,0 20,0 20,20 0,0\"','fill=\"#22c55e\"','stroke=\"#14532d\"']) if (!freeformClosed.includes(expected)) throw new Error(freeformClosed); const freeform = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-freeform.svg', 'utf8'); if (!freeform.includes('<polygon') || !freeform.includes('fill=\"#f97316\"')) throw new Error(freeform); const picture = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-picture.svg', 'utf8'); if (!picture.includes('<image') || !picture.includes('opacity=\"0.35\"') || !picture.includes('preserveAspectRatio=\"xMidYMid slice\"') || !picture.includes('transform=\"rotate(30 20 25) translate(20 25) scale(-1 1) translate(-20 -25)\"')) throw new Error(picture); const preset = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-preset.svg', 'utf8'); if (!preset.includes('<polygon') || !preset.includes('points=\"30,20 50,40 10,40\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"70,20 80,30 70,40 60,30\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"120,20 160,20 160,36.4 150,40 140,37.6 130,40 120,36.4\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"170,20 200,20 210,30 200,40 170,40 180,30\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"227,20 233,20 233,27 240,27 240,33 233,33 233,40 227,40 227,33 220,33 220,27 227,27\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"260,20 262.4,27.6 270,27.6 263.8,31.8 266.2,40 260,34.4 253.8,40 256.2,31.8 250,27.6 257.6,27.6\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"280,25 306,25 306,20 320,30 306,40 306,35 280,35\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"330,20 370,20 354.8,31.6 354.8,40 345.2,40 345.2,31.6\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"380,23.6 388,26 388,20 412,20 412,26 420,23.6 416,30 420,36.4 412,34 412,40 388,40 388,34 380,36.4 384,30\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"450,20 470,25 460,25 460,28 470,28 470,32 460,32 460,40 440,40 440,32 430,32 430,28 440,28 440,25 430,25\"') || !preset.includes('points=\"490,30 490,20 491.3053,20.0856') || !preset.includes('points=\"520,20 523.8268,20.7612 527.0711,22.9289') || !preset.includes('points=\"550,20 551.2,27.2 555.8,22 553.6,28.6') || !preset.includes('<rect x=\"570\" y=\"20\" width=\"40\" height=\"20\" rx=\"3.3333\" ry=\"3.3333\" fill=\"#fde2e2\"') || !preset.includes('<ellipse cx=\"630\" cy=\"30\" rx=\"10\" ry=\"10\" fill=\"#cffafe\"') || !preset.includes('<rect x=\"650\" y=\"20\" width=\"40\" height=\"20\" rx=\"3.3333\" ry=\"3.3333\" fill=\"#dbeafe\"')) throw new Error(preset); const alpha = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-alpha.svg', 'utf8'); if (!alpha.includes('fill-opacity=\"0.5\"') || !alpha.includes('stroke-opacity=\"0.25\"') || !alpha.includes('stroke-width=\"2\"')) throw new Error(alpha); const color = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-color.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['fill=\"#99b2cc\"','stroke=\"#223962\"','fill=\"#336699\"','fill=\"#339999\"','fill=\"#112233\"','stroke=\"#555e66\"','fill=\"#3cb371\"','stroke=\"#804600\"','fill=\"#f5f5f5\"']) if (!color.includes(expected)) throw new Error(color); const connectorStyleRef = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-connector-style-ref.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['data-kind=\"relation\"','stroke=\"#dc2626\"','stroke-opacity=\"0.6\"','stroke-width=\"2\"']) if (!connectorStyleRef.includes(expected)) throw new Error(connectorStyleRef); const effects = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-fill-effects.svg', 'utf8'); if (!effects.includes('fill=\"#800080\"') || !effects.includes('fill-opacity=\"0.75\"') || !effects.includes('stroke=\"#004000\"') || !effects.includes('stroke-opacity=\"0.75\"')) throw new Error(effects); const lineArrow = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-line-arrow.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['<marker id=\"svgraph-arrow\"','marker-start=\"url(#svgraph-arrow)\"','marker-end=\"url(#svgraph-arrow)\"','stroke=\"#111827\"','stroke-width=\"2\"']) if (!lineArrow.includes(expected)) throw new Error(lineArrow); const lineFlipBool = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-line-flip-bool.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['id=\"boolean-flip-line\"','x1=\"50\"','y1=\"40\"','x2=\"10\"','y2=\"20\"','stroke=\"#111827\"','stroke-width=\"2\"']) if (!lineFlipBool.includes(expected)) throw new Error(lineFlipBool); if (lineFlipBool.includes('transform=\"translate')) throw new Error(lineFlipBool); const lineStyle = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-line-style.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['stroke-linecap=\"round\"','stroke-linejoin=\"round\"','stroke-dasharray=\"4 3 1 3\"','stroke-linecap=\"square\"','stroke-linejoin=\"miter\"','stroke-dasharray=\"4 2\"','stroke-miterlimit=\"6\"']) if (!lineStyle.includes(expected)) throw new Error(lineStyle); const styleRef = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-style-ref.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['fill=\"#223962\"','stroke=\"#ed7d31\"','stroke-opacity=\"0.5\"','stroke-width=\"2\"','fill=\"#16a34a\"','fill-opacity=\"0.75\"']) if (!styleRef.includes(expected)) throw new Error(styleRef); const textBaseline = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-text-baseline-threshold.svg', 'utf8'); if (/baseline-shift=\"super\"[^>]*>Low</.test(textBaseline) || /baseline-shift=\"sub\"[^>]*>Low</.test(textBaseline)) throw new Error(textBaseline); for (const expected of ['>Low</tspan>','baseline-shift=\"super\"> Super</tspan>','baseline-shift=\"sub\"> Sub</tspan>']) if (!textBaseline.includes(expected)) throw new Error(textBaseline); const textStyle = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-text-style.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['<tspan','font-size=\"18\"','font-weight=\"bold\"','font-style=\"italic\"','font-family=\"Aptos Display\"','font-variant=\"small-caps\"','fill=\"#dc2626\"','fill-opacity=\"0.85\"','stroke=\"#2563eb\"','stroke-width=\"1\"','stroke-linecap=\"square\"','stroke-linejoin=\"round\"','text-decoration=\"underline\"','text-decoration-style=\"dashed\"','text-decoration-color=\"#16a34a80\"','text-decoration-thickness=\"2\"','baseline-shift=\"super\"','letter-spacing=\"2\"']) if (!textStyle.includes(expected)) throw new Error(textStyle); const textDefaults = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-text-defaults.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['font-size=\"18\"','font-weight=\"bold\"','font-style=\"italic\"','font-family=\"Aptos Display\"','font-variant=\"small-caps\"','text-decoration=\"underline line-through\"','fill=\"#334455\"','font-size=\"12\"','fill=\"#aa5500\"','font-size=\"16\"','font-family=\"Aptos\"','letter-spacing=\"1.6\"','stroke=\"#cc5500\"','stroke-width=\"2\"','font-family=\"Yu Gothic\"']) if (!textDefaults.includes(expected)) throw new Error(textDefaults); const textBullets = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-text-bullets.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['* ','Direct bullet','\t','Tabbed','- ','List bullet','dy=\"1.2em\"','After break','d) ','Auto alpha','VII. ','Roman','4000. ','Roman overflow']) if (!textBullets.includes(expected)) throw new Error(textBullets); const textLayout = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-text-layout.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['id=\"inset-text\"','x=\"12\" y=\"35\"','white-space=\"nowrap\"','id=\"centered-text\"','x=\"40\"','text-anchor=\"middle\"','id=\"middle-text\"','y=\"120\"','dominant-baseline=\"middle\"','id=\"right-rtl-text\"','x=\"100\" y=\"170\"','text-anchor=\"end\"','dominant-baseline=\"text-after-edge\"','direction=\"rtl\"','id=\"list-align-text\"']) if (!textLayout.includes(expected)) throw new Error(textLayout); const textShapePaint = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-text-shape-paint.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['fill=\"#aa5500\"','fill-opacity=\"0.7\"','stroke=\"#224466\"','stroke-opacity=\"0.4\"','stroke-width=\"1\"','stroke-linecap=\"round\"','stroke-linejoin=\"round\"','stroke-dasharray=\"4 3\"']) if (!textShapePaint.includes(expected)) throw new Error(textShapePaint); const tableRich = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-table-rich.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['data-kind=\"table\"','fill=\"#e0f2fe\"','fill-opacity=\"0.6\"','stroke=\"#dc2626\"','stroke-opacity=\"0.5\"','stroke-width=\"2\"','stroke-linecap=\"square\"','stroke-dasharray=\"4 2\"','stroke-miterlimit=\"6\"','x=\"16\" y=\"20.5\"','text-anchor=\"middle\"','font-weight=\"bold\"','dominant-baseline=\"text-after-edge\"','direction=\"rtl\"','white-space=\"nowrap\"','<tspan','fill=\"#dc2626\"','font-size=\"14\"']) if (!tableRich.includes(expected)) throw new Error(tableRich); if ((tableRich.match(/<text [^>]*fill=\"#000000\"[^>]*fill=\"/g) || []).length) throw new Error(tableRich); const tableMergeBool = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-table-merge-bool.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['id=\"boolean-merge-table\"','data-kind=\"table\"','x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"80\" height=\"40\"','x=\"0\" y=\"40\" width=\"40\" height=\"80\"','x=\"40\" y=\"80\" width=\"40\" height=\"40\"','data-colspan=\"2\"','Wide</text>','Tall</text>','B</text>','D</text>']) if (!tableMergeBool.includes(expected)) throw new Error(tableMergeBool); if ((tableMergeBool.match(/data-kind=\"cell\"/g) || []).length !== 4) throw new Error(tableMergeBool); const tableScaled = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-table-scaled.svg', 'utf8'); for (const expected of ['id=\"scaled-table\"','data-kind=\"table\"','x=\"10\" y=\"20\" width=\"20\" height=\"30\"','x=\"30\" y=\"20\" width=\"20\" height=\"30\"','x=\"10\" y=\"50\" width=\"40\" height=\"30\"','data-colspan=\"2\"','A</text>','B</text>','Wide</text>']) if (!tableScaled.includes(expected)) throw new Error(tableScaled); })" && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs svgraph examples/sample.svg > tmp/package-svgraph.json
